title: Shardbound: Shields of Fate
description: Shardbound: Shields of Fate is a PvP plugin where each player receives a unique, soulbound shield with passive combat abilities, assigned randomly on first join. Inspired by Shard SMP, it turns every fight into a clash of distinct powers and identities
body:
🛡️ Shardbound: Shields of Fate
Turn PvP into a battle of destinies.

Every player who joins your server is granted a unique, soulbound shield — a mystical artifact infused with one of several passive combat powers. From burning attackers to bending space, each shield defines your player's role in battle.

Inspired by the class-based flair of Shard SMP, this plugin brings RPG identity and progression to survival and PvP servers without needing any economy or custom items.

🔥 Key Features:
Random Shield Assignment: One shield per player, bound for life.

12+ Unique Abilities: Burn, slow, heal, knockback, reflect, and more.

Soulbinding System: Shields can't be dropped, lost, or shared.

PvP Focused: Balanced passive effects, ideal for both 1v1s and war servers.

PlaceholderAPI Support: Show player shield stats with ease.

Perfect for PvP servers, RPG worlds, and survival with a twist.
No commands needed to start — just join and embrace your fate.
